sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: [{"pathway_id": "low_risk_L1", "title": "Low-Risk Disease: INRG Stage L1 Tumors", "branching_basis": ["INRG Stage (L1)", "MYCN amplification status", "Age", "Image-defined risk factors (IDRFs)"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Infants <6 months with isolated adrenal masses <5 cm in diameter (L1)", "options": [{"type": "observation", "label": "Observation without biopsy or resection", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Observation for patients <6 months of age with L1 adrenal tumor with maximum diameter ≤3.1 cm if solid or ≤5 cm if at least 25% cystic component. Obtain MIBG scan to confirm localized disease. If the patient is <6 months of age with adrenal tumor, no MIBG scan is required unless signs and symptoms are suggestive of metastatic disease [NEUROB-3].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "No adjuvant therapy required; surveillance only."}}, {"criteria": "Other L1 tumors (not meeting criteria above for observation)", "options": [{"type": "surgery", "label": "Surgical resection", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Patients with INRG Stage L1 tumors are often cured with surgical resection. If upfront surgery will potentially obviate the need for chemotherapy and can be safely performed with minimal morbidity, a resection should be performed [NEUROB-E 2 of 5, NEUROB-3].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "If resection is incomplete and MYCN amplification is detected, reassign to high-risk group [NEUROB-3, NEUROB-2]."}}]}, {"pathway_id": "low_risk_MS", "title": "Low-Risk Disease: INRG Stage MS with Favorable Biology", "branching_basis": ["INRG Stage (MS)", "Age (<12 months)", "MYCN amplification status", "Histology (FH)", "DNA index", "Segmental chromosomal aberrations"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Asymptomatic, <12 months, MYCN non-amplified, FH, DI >1, SCA negative", "options": [{"type": "observation", "label": "Observation", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "For patients with INRG MS disease who are asymptomatic and have tumors with favorable biology (FH, DI >1, no SCA), observation is the preferred approach [NEUROB-3, MS-10].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "No adjuvant therapy; surveillance with imaging as clinically indicated."}}]}, {"pathway_id": "intermediate_risk_localized_favorable_biology", "title": "Intermediate-Risk Disease: Localized Tumors with Favorable Biology", "branching_basis": ["Risk classification (intermediate-risk)", "Age", "Histology (FH)", "DNA index", "Segmental chromosomal aberrations", "Response to chemotherapy"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "All favorable biology: <365 days with UH, DI >1, no SCA; <365 days with FH, DI = 1, no SCA; <365 days with UH, DI = 1, no SCA; <365 days with FH, DI >1 and SCA; ≥365 days with FH and SCA", "options": [{"type": "chemotherapy", "label": "2 cycles of chemotherapy", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Administer 2 cycles of multiagent chemotherapy (COG ANBL0531 regimen or SIOPEN regimen). Audiologic assessment and echocardiogram should be obtained at diagnosis and again at end of therapy [NEUROB-4].", "linked_regimen_ids": ["COG_ANBL0531_intermediate", "SIOPEN_intermediate"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Response assessment after 2 cycles; if ≥PR, proceed to surveillance. If <PR, multidisciplinary discussion of surgery versus additional chemotherapy."}}, {"criteria": "Favorable biology patients who achieve ≥PR after 2 cycles", "options": [{"type": "surveillance", "label": "Surveillance", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "If ≥PR achieved after 2 cycles, begin surveillance [NEUROB-4]. Obtain MIBG scan as part of end of therapy evaluation if the treatment endpoint has been achieved [NEUROB-4, footnote w].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "No additional treatment required if target response achieved."}}, {"criteria": "Favorable biology patients who have <PR after 2 cycles", "options": [{"type": "chemotherapy", "label": "Additional chemotherapy cycles (consider 4 cycles total)", "preference": "recommended", "recommendation": "Multidisciplinary discussion of the role for surgery versus additional chemotherapy. Consider 2–4 additional cycles with repeat primary tumor imaging after every 2 cycles. Consider surgery if chemotherapy has led to stable disease (SD) or minimal improvement. Consider biopsy as the tumor may have differentiated [NEUROB-4, NEUROB-D 1 of 13].", "linked_regimen_ids": ["COG_ANBL0531_intermediate", "SIOPEN_intermediate"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Iterative multidisciplinary assessment until treatment endpoint achieved."}}]}, {"pathway_id": "intermediate_risk_localized_unfavorable_biology", "title": "Intermediate-Risk Disease: Localized Tumors with Unfavorable Biology", "branching_basis": ["Risk classification", "Age", "Histology", "Segmental chromosomal aberrations", "Re"]}]
